2603.25737.title: Training the Knowledge Base through Evidence Distillation and Write-Back Enrichment
2603.25737.paper_summary: The knowledge base in a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system is typically assembled once and never revised, even though the facts a query requires are often fragmented across documents and buried in irrelevant content. We argue that the knowledge base should be treated as a trainable component and propose WriteBack-RAG, a framework that uses labeled examples to identify where retrieval succeeds, isolate the relevant documents, and distill them into compact knowledge units that are indexed alongside the original corpus. Because the method modifies only the corpus, it can be applied once as an offline preprocessing step and combined with any RAG pipeline. Across four RAG methods, six benchmarks, and two LLM backbones, WriteBack-RAG improves every evaluated setting, with gains averaging +2.14%. Cross-method transfer experiments further show that the distilled knowledge benefits RAG pipelines other than the one used to produce it, confirming that the improvement resides in the corpus itself.
2603.25737.paper_summary_zh: 檢索增強生成（RAG）系統中的知識庫通常只組建一次，並且從不修訂，儘管查詢所需的事實往往分散在文件中並埋藏在不相關的內容中。<lb/>我們主張知識庫應被視為可訓練的組件，並提出WriteBack-RAG，一個利用標記範例來識別檢索成功的地方、隔離相關文件並將其提煉成緊湊知識單元的框架，這些單元與原始語料庫一起編入索引。<lb/>由於該方法僅修改語料庫，因此可以作為離線預處理步驟一次性應用，並與任何RAG管道結合。<lb/>在四種RAG方法、六個基準和兩個LLM骨幹中，WriteBack-RAG改善了每個評估設置，平均增益為+2.14%。<lb/>跨方法轉移實驗進一步顯示，提煉的知識對於其他RAG管道也有益，而不僅僅是用於產生它的管道，確認改進存在於語料庫本身。
2603.25737.author: Yuxing Lu et.al.
2603.25737.authors: Yuxing Lu, Xukai Zhao, Wei Wu, Jinzhuo Wang
